label: Dark Energy Evolution Parameter w_a
mathematical_goal: Derive w_a = -1/√b₃ = -1/√24 ≈ -0.2041 from G₂ moduli dynamics. Compare against DESI 2025 (wa = -0.99 ± 0.32). The ~2.5σ tension is a known leading-order limitation.
theoretical_significance: The dark energy evolution parameter w_a = -1/√b₃ = -0.2041 is a leading-order geometric prediction from G₂ moduli rolling dynamics. The formula captures the correct thawing sign (wa < 0) and order of magnitude. The ~2.5σ tension with DESI 2025 (wa = -0.99 ± 0.32) indicates the leading-order approximation underestimates the amplitude of dark energy evolution. Non-linear thawing corrections and 12-pair breathing aggregation may improve agreement.

cpl_parameterization.interpretation: Thawing from phantom (w < -1) at early times to quintessence (w > -1) at late times

geometry.fundamental_constant: b₃ = 24 (third Betti number of TCS G₂)
geometry.physical_interpretation: Rate of moduli rolling in G₂ potential landscape
geometry.mechanism: Moduli kinetic energy contribution scales as 1/√b₃

derivation_chain: G₂ manifold: b₃ = 24 (third Betti number, counts 3-cycles)
Moduli dynamics: φ̈ + 3Hφ̇ + V'(φ) = 0 in expanding universe
Rolling rate: dw/da ~ -1/√b₃ from potential curvature

honesty.known_limitation: Leading-order formula underestimates |wa|. Non-linear thawing corrections from moduli-quintessence coupling may reduce the 2.5σ tension.
honesty.correction_from_v23_2: Removed unjustified x4 'CPL factor' that was previously applied to the base wa value. The factor had no rigorous derivation and artificially matched an outdated DESI DR2 value (wa = -0.816). Now uses honest leading-order prediction against SSoT DESI 2025 data.

combined_w0_wa.correlation: Both from b₃ = 24 with no free parameters

implications.thawing_direction: w_a < 0 confirms thawing dark energy (correct sign)
implications.topological_origin: Evolution rate encoded in G₂ 3-cycle structure
implications.predictive_power: No free parameters - w_a fixed by b₃ alone
